briefing.ai_trends: Agentic AI is moving to production with 40% enterprise adoption expected by 2026; heavy focus on task-specific agents.
briefing.market_valuation: OpenAI secures $110B financing round with $730B pre-money valuation.
briefing.infrastructure: Gartner predicts 90% cost reduction for trillion-parameter inference by 2030; strong push for inference-specialized silicon.
briefing.ai_search: AI Search Engine market projected to hit $87.6B by 2035.
briefing.update_notes: Synchronized with global trends: Agentic AI production scale, massive infrastructure investment, and significant model/valuation updates as of March 25, 2026.
